description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux distro build that triggers on push events. Run a multi-job workflow with various Linux distributions including Debian Buster, Bullseye, Fedora 33, OpenSUSE Leap, OpenSUSE Tumbleweed, ArchLinux, ArchLinux-Qt6, WebAssembly, and RaspberryPi. For each job, install git, checkout code with submodules, install dependencies, and build the project using custom scripts.
